scripts.build: pnpm --filter screeps-connectivity build && pnpm --filter screeps-client build
scripts.build:mod: pnpm --filter screeps-connectivity build && pnpm --filter screeps-client build:embedded
scripts.build:release: pnpm --filter screeps-connectivity build && pnpm --filter screeps-client build:all
scripts.desktop: pnpm --filter screeps-connectivity build && pnpm --filter screeps-desktop dev
scripts.desktop:build: pnpm --filter screeps-connectivity build && pnpm --filter screeps-desktop build
